LAW AND MOTION 302, RE: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PIPEFY, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR FOR NON-COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 435.5, WHICH REQUIRES THE PARTIES TO CONDUCT A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE FILING. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY. PIPEFY'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY NOVEMBER 13, 2023. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-13-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2023 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-09-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-10-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Defendant's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. PIPEFY, INC.'s demurrer is taken off calendar for non-compliance with CCP 430.41, which requires the parties to conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before filing. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately. PIPEFY's response to the complaint is now due by November 13, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-10-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Defendant's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. PIPEFY, INC.'s motion to strike is taken off calendar for non-compliance with CCP 435.5, which requires the parties to conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before filing. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately. PIPEFY's response to the complaint is now due by November 13, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)
